# TravelPlan: Summer Break in Cala Ratjada, Mallorca

| Day 1 — 2026-07-15 — Arrival & Coastal Relaxation | Day 2 — 2026-07-16 — Hidden Beaches & Local Flavors | Day 3 — 2026-07-17 — Tramuntana Day Trip & Hiking | Day 4 — 2026-07-18 — Final Morning & Departure |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **1. Flight to Palma de Mallorca** [transport] 09:00–11:45 @ Berlin Brandenburg Airport (BER) (€400.00) — Direct flight from Berlin (BER) to Palma de Mallorca (PMI). Estimated cost for 2 adults based on peak July pricing. — Links: [link 1](https://www.google.com/travel/flights/flights-from-berlin-to-palma.html) | **1. Hidden Beach: Hike to Cala Torta** [attraction] 09:00–13:00 @ Cala Torta, Artà — Drive to Cala Mesquida and hike the coastal trail to the secluded Cala Torta. A 'virgin' beach in a natural reserve. Bring water and snacks. — Links: [link 1](https://www.seemallorca.com/beaches/cala-torta-beach-north-east-697634) | **1. Drive to Tramuntana Mountains** [transport] 09:00–10:30 @ Cala Ratjada to Valldemossa/Deià — Scenic drive across the island to the Tramuntana mountains (approx. 1.5 hours). | **1. Morning Swim at Cala Agulla** [leisure] 09:00–11:00 @ Cala Agulla, Cala Ratjada — Final morning swim at Cala Agulla, a beautiful beach surrounded by pine trees, just a short drive or walk from the hotel. |
| **2. Car Rental Pickup & Drive to Cala Ratjada** [transport] 12:00–13:30 @ Palma de Mallorca Airport (PMI) (€180.00) — Pick up rental car at the airport. Estimated cost for 4 days in July. Drive to Cala Ratjada (approx. 1 hour). — Links: [link 1](https://www.skyscanner.net/car-hire-from/pmi/car-hire-from-palma-majorca-airport.html) | **2. Traditional Lunch at Sa Trobada** [meal] 14:00–15:30 @ Sa Trobada, Capdepera — Authentic Mallorcan lunch in the historic center of Capdepera. Traditional dishes away from the tourist crowds. | **2. Light Hike: Deià Coastal Loop** [attraction] 10:30–13:30 @ Deià to Cala Deià Trail — A light 5km circular hike from the village of Deià down to the scenic shingle beach of Cala Deià. Classic stone paths and olive groves. — Links: [link 1](https://www.alltrails.com/poi/spain/mallorca/deia/cala-deia) | **2. Drive to Airport & Car Return** [transport] 12:00–13:30 @ Cala Ratjada to PMI Airport — Drive back to Palma Airport and return the rental car. Allow time for traffic. |
| **3. Hotel Check-in** [lodging] 14:00–14:30 @ Lago Garden Apart-Suites & Spa Hotel, Cala Ratjada (€867.00) — Check-in at a highly-rated boutique hotel. Lago Garden offers a luxury spa experience near the harbor. — Links: [link 1](https://travelstack.nuitee.link/hotels?placeId=ChIJde3StVgWlhIRYQHEEMePNXE&checkin=2026-07-15&checkout=2026-07-18&adults=2) | **3. Capdepera Castle Visit** [leisure] 16:00–17:30 @ Castell de Capdepera — Visit the medieval castle of Capdepera for panoramic views of the coastline. | **3. Explore Valldemossa** [leisure] 15:30–17:30 @ Valldemossa — Explore the charming streets of Valldemossa or visit the Cartuja. Allow ample time for the return drive to Cala Ratjada. | **3. Flight to Berlin Airport (BER)** [transport] 15:00–17:45 @ Palma de Mallorca Airport (PMI) — Direct flight from Palma de Mallorca (PMI) to Berlin (BER). Cost included in Day 1 round-trip estimate. — Links: [link 1](https://www.google.com/travel/flights/flights-from-berlin-to-palma.html) |
| **4. Late Lunch at Noah's Lounge** [meal] 14:30–16:00 @ Noah’s Lounge, Cala Ratjada Promenade — Relaxed lunch by the sea at Noah's Lounge. High-quality international cuisine and great atmosphere. — Links: [link 1](https://www.themallorcan.com/blog/best-restaurants-cala-ratjada) | **4. Dinner at Restaurant Los Arcos** [meal] 20:00–22:00 @ Restaurant Los Arcos, Cala Ratjada — Iconic Mediterranean gastronomy. Famous for fresh fish and paella. Highest rated local spot. — Links: [link 1](http://www.losarcoscalarajada.com/) | **4. Return Drive to Cala Ratjada** [transport] 17:30–19:30 @ Valldemossa to Cala Ratjada — Drive back to Cala Ratjada. Estimated 1.5 - 2 hours with afternoon traffic. Arrive by 19:30 to freshen up for dinner. |  |
| **5. Beach Relaxation & Harbor Stroll** [leisure] 16:00–19:00 @ Playa Son Moll, Cala Ratjada — Spend the afternoon lounging at Playa Son Moll or exploring the Cala Ratjada harbor. |  | **5. Farewell Dinner at CUCUM Beach House** [meal] 20:00–22:00 @ CUCUM Beach House, Playa Son Moll — Sophisticated beachfront dining at the newly rebranded CUCUM Beach House. Perfect for a final night celebration. |  |
| **6. Dinner at Rö Sushi Nikkei** [meal] 19:30–21:30 @ Rö Sushi Nikkei, Cala Ratjada — High-quality fusion dining with harbor views. Blending Japanese and Peruvian flavors. — Links: [link 1](https://www.themallorcan.com/blog/best-restaurants-cala-ratjada) |  |  |  |

**Total estimated cost: €1447.00** (Day 1: €1447.00, Day 2: €0.00, Day 3: €0.00, Day 4: €0.00)
